form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.02) at Richmond Straight in a Grade 4, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.69) at this track in a Mix 2/3, finishing fifth and beaten 15 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when seventh over 400m at Maitland. Prepared to just watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when seventh over 400m at Maitland. Prepared to just watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the heels turning on to the back straight and lost ground sharply.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 10 lengths at Casino. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Needs to find best and prepared to watch this time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by 2 lengths at this track (17.30) beating Karen Stratus in a NG on March 21. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just a couple of days ago over 300m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a NG. Has clocked a scorching 17.11 here at this trip. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked off the heels on the trun out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at The Gardens then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fifth (17.92) at this track. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2 lengths at Casino over 300m (17.14) beating Slimy Trout in Mix 3/4 on March 31. Was strong in the market last start won accordingly. Worth following.
